commands.repair_reason: Protected-label auth storage migration with failing CI and a security-sensitive storage tradeoff needs human maintainer handling, not an automated repair lane.; Cleared: No supply-chain or code-execution issue was found; the diff is security-sensitive because it changes OAuth token at-rest storage, which needs maintainer acceptance. commands.review_summary:
The PR removes Codex OAuth `oauthRef` sidecar runtime support, persists Codex OAuth material inline, and adds doctor-only migration/cleanup for legacy sidecar-backed profiles.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is an auth-storage cleanup rather than a standalone bug report. Current-main and PR-head source inspection show the before/after `oauthRef` behavior, and the PR body reports focused Testbox plus live OAuth proof.
commands.review_followup: Protected-label auth storage migration with failing CI and a security-sensitive storage tradeoff needs human maintainer handling, not an automated repair lane.
